title: Des Bijoux
body:
This is the texture pack was an old project of mine. It took me 2 years, and sadly discontinued due to people caliming my project as their own, and there were so many of them that I couldn't check every person on youtube. Stress overall was also a reason since it was the time when I was applying to college. You might find the owner of the pack to be named LickePandos, it was my old username. This pack is updated up to 1.18, and I am not sure if I'll update it in the future, but I feel like there's a chance. Thank you for understanting.

Des Bijoux texture pack's goal is to make high resolution textures, while keeping a bit of simplicity and not make it too realistic. The pack contains blocks, mobs and items (up to 1.18), it also contains connected textures and more!
Des Bijoux means jewelry in French, so the pack gives the feel of the textures to be "valuable". Every single texture is hand drawn, and believe it or not, no professional drawing experience. It was my first ever texture pack, and I hope you enjoy it!

NEEDS OPTIFINE (or other mods that are able to replace features from optifine) FOR SOME FEATURES TO WORK!
